description: Evaluation cases for the iterative deep-research skill

evals.name: comparison-decision
evals.prompt: I need to choose between Postgres on RDS and Supabase for a B2B SaaS product. Please do a research-backed comparison that covers product fit, operational overhead, realtime capabilities, vendor lock-in, and likely failure modes for a team of 6 engineers.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown research report with multiple search rounds, evidence-backed findings, counterevidence, and a recommendation tied to the stated constraints.

assertions.name: required_sections
assertions.criteria: Report includes the core iterative-research sections

assertions.name: multi_round_process
assertions.criteria: Research Process reflects more than one round

assertions.name: counterevidence_present
assertions.criteria: The report addresses failure modes, limits, or opposing evidence

evals.name: trend-landscape
evals.prompt: Can you research the 2025 landscape for AI agent frameworks? I want something more than a surface summary. Please map the main players, key architecture trends, where the field seems to be converging, and where the evidence is still noisy or contradictory.
evals.expected_output: A landscape report that demonstrates iterative follow-up research, highlights contradictions or noisy evidence, and distinguishes sourced facts from synthesis.

assertions.name: required_sections
assertions.criteria: Report includes the core iterative-research sections

assertions.name: iterative_reasoning
assertions.criteria: Later rounds build on gaps or conflicts from earlier rounds

evals.name: high-stakes-recommendation
evals.prompt: We're deciding whether to build our internal analytics dashboard stack around Metabase, Grafana, or a custom React app over Postgres. Please research the options and give a recommendation that takes into account maintenance burden, user flexibility, access control, and common ways these choices go wrong in practice.
evals.expected_output: A recommendation report that shows iterative research, includes counterevidence or failure modes, and gives a scoped recommendation rather than a generic summary.

assertions.name: required_sections
assertions.criteria: Report includes the core iterative-research sections

assertions.name: multi_round_process
assertions.criteria: Research Process reflects at least two rounds
